message:
test(engine): add comprehensive unit test suite for tier-up profiler
covering policy, cache hit rates, candidate selection, and evidence

Add 447-line inline test module to tier_up_profiler.rs with coverage for:

Policy:
- TierUpPolicy::default() returns sensible thresholds (min_total_steps=64,
  min_invocations=16, min_cache_hit_rate=600k millionths, max_candidates=4)
- policy_hash is deterministic across identical configs
- policy_hash changes when any config field is mutated

Cache analysis:
- cache_hit_rate_millionths computation from VM execution events
- Edge cases: zero events, all-hit, all-miss, mixed hit/miss ratios

Candidate selection:
- Hot-path identification from execution traces
- Filtering by minimum invocation count and cache signal requirements
- Top-K candidate limiting and ordering

Evidence:
- Evidence artifact generation and serialization round-trips

Meta:
- .beads/issues.jsonl: sync issue tracker state

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
